rubric_item_scores.improvement_suggestion: Document any rounding or numeric parsing rules explicitly in the report (e.g., integer handling) and, if available, attach analytical uncertainty estimates or justify their absence.
rubric_item_scores.notes: QC rules applied as specified: yield > 70 and impurity < 10. Computed margins (yield_margin_pp = yield - 70; impurity_margin_pp = 10 - impurity) and rule evaluations in CSV are mathematically correct for all three runs (examples: Run1 yield_margin -8, impurity_margin -6; Run2 yield_margin 6, impurity_margin -3; Run3 yield_margin 9, impurity_margin -12). Strict inequalities are used and documented.
